title: Data and processing times for international student visas :: Immigration New Zealand
content:
## Data and processing times for international student visas
Find data about education agent performance, offshore student visa application decisions and visa processing times for international students.
- Education agent performance data Find student visa approval rate data for education agents recruiting students from overseas.

## Education agent performance data
Find student visa approval rate data for education agents recruiting students from overseas.
- Overseas student visa application decision data Find student visa application outcomes for applicants who apply from outside New Zealand, broken down by applicant nationality.

## Overseas student visa application decision data
Find student visa application outcomes for applicants who apply from outside New Zealand, broken down by applicant nationality.
- Student visa wait times Find out how long it takes us to process student visa applications for international students.

## Student visa wait times
Find out how long it takes us to process student visa applications for international students.
